description: CompositionBroad orange and grey stripes T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed and tipped collar with a buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with branding on the left one, appliqué d and printed brand badge on left chest and has a vented hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakingRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWarm iron only, but do not iron directly on print/embroideryFlaunt your youthful attitude in style with this broad striped t-shirt from basics. The stylish brand badge exudes vibrancy, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this T-shirt with shorts or jeans and floaters for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
